title: Parameter/attribute type encoding in protobuf backend

features.name: parameter with x-bit binary literal
features.description: Code should include a parameter assignment using a binary literal that contains 'x' (unknown) bits, where the x-bits should be preserved rather than treated as zeros

features.name: large bit-width parameter computed from expression
features.description: Code should include a parameter with a bit-width computed from an expression (like 72*8-1) that exceeds typical integer sizes, where the numeric value should be preserved as a numeric type rather than converted to string

features.name: string vs numeric parameter type distinction
features.description: Code should include two parameters with identical string representations but different types - one numeric (hex literal) and one string literal - where type information must be preserved to distinguish them
